goal: DeepSeek consult — Mac-local agents + cloud orchestrator + proposals (Mohamed requested again)
commands: cd ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge && git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main

cd ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge && python3 scripts/consult.py --models deepseek "OGZ architecture review (June 2026). LOCKED: Mohamed talks ONLY in Cursor (phone+Mac). Mac Mini runs brain :4140, mac-sync, executor, API keys in ~/.abraham_env. Cloud Cursor plans and queues missions to GitHub; Mac pulls, runs shell missions, pushes status. NO SSH cloud-to-Mac. PROPOSALS agent first: harvest ~/agents to ~/Desktop/ogz-proposals, Google Drive SA, Slides output. Agent Kit: Think=GitHub+Cursor, Run=Mac homes, Archive=Drive+~/OGZ-Archive. Mohamed asks: should we build ALL agents on Mac Mini locally (they take tasks, report to cloud via mirror/events, not chat to user)? Launch many agents vs one executor? Mode A on-demand vs Mode B 24/7 daemons. Give: (1) verdict on Mac-local agents + cloud planner split, (2) top 3 risks, (3) what NOT to build, (4) exact implementation order for next 7 days, (5) one sentence for Mohamed." | tee data/cursor_missions/artifacts/consult_mirror_proposals_latest.txt

cd ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge && python3 scripts/consult.py --models gpt,gemini "Cross-check DeepSeek verdict on OGZ Mac-local agents + Cursor-only control. Agree or disagree in 5 bullets." | tee -a data/cursor_missions/artifacts/consult_mirror_proposals_latest.txt
